title: All impls: TDMA slot scheduling
description:
Implement TDMA slot scheduling in all three codebases.

## Shared logic
1. Beacon RX and time sync
2. Slot assignment parsing
3. TX queue holds packets until assigned slot
4. Contention slot fallback for unassigned nodes

## Python (python/src/lichen/)
- Add tdma/ module with SlotScheduler
- Integrate with link layer TX path

## Rust (rust/src/)
- Add tdma module
- Integrate with radio abstraction

## Zephyr (lichen/subsys/lichen/)
- Add tdma/ subsystem
- Use Zephyr k_timer for slot timing
- Kconfig: CONFIG_LICHEN_TDMA_ENABLED

## Gateway role
- Beacon TX at superframe start
- Slot assignment algorithm
- Track active nodes for dynamic assignment
close_reason: TDMA time slots, superframes, cells, assignment, scheduled mode impls completed for Python, Rust, Zephyr and test vectors. Emphasis on GNSS-PPS and frequency agility. Completed 3 independent codereview passes, fixed every finding identified. All CCP sections advanced.
